volume_verdict: FY2025 iPhone revenue grew 4% on higher net sales of Pro models, making growth price/mix-driven. Wearables, Home and Accessories declined 4% on lower accessories and wearables sales, while Services grew 14% on advertising, App Store and cloud; both are blended because Apple did not disclose a volume/price split.

evidence.management_phrase: higher net sales of Pro models

data_gaps: Apple does not disclose true unit volumes or a quantified volume/price split by category.
caveat: This company does not disclose true unit volumes. The volume/price split above is inferred from qualitative management commentary, not verified units. Confidence in this split should be treated as moderate, not high.
